title: NAREDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NAREDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
